SuperFAISS at v3.1 + fix/avx2-segment-sub8-remainder (local commit d62c162, pre-tag) — v3.0 channel-capable scratch banks + channel-scoped analytics + archive v3, v3.1 runtime-mutable channel vocabulary (Relabel), and the AVX2 float32 dot/L2 sub-8 segment-remainder fix (T-099: a length-4 channel scored 0 on AVX2; segmented/per-channel-cosine path only). Only src/kernels_avx2.cpp changed since 3bc6798. Code + docs synced from the fix branch; core+plugin tag together.
